title: Bounded Workstation Mirror Validation Of Packet 075 Test-Surface Artifact
objective: Mirror and validate the exact Packet 075 four-file host test-surface decomposition artifact on the workstation without publication, host reconciliation, package mutation, installs, migration approval, or simultaneous multi-worker execution.
validation_note: Focused Playwright completed with exit code 0 and 3 passing tests. The process emitted the existing webserver `pnpm is not recognized` warning after the pass output, but no install or package-manager activation/download was performed and the command succeeded.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 077 - Post-076 Validated Decomposition Artifact Publication Reconciliation Or Defer Decision
sql_permission_note: This validation packet authorizes no database writes and no publication, host reconciliation, source widening, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, second-worker execution, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05. Packet 076 mirrored the exact Packet 075 four-file host artifact into the workstation copy, confirmed matching SHA-256 `aa258683ae8451a61322894b8c8995a2710c8a68f05a6cf5701c05401450b84a`, passed diff hygiene, `tsc --noEmit`, `next build`, and focused Playwright over the three decomposed spec files with 3 tests passed. The host artifact remains unpublished and uncommitted.
